items.title: Hosted staging GateForge run
items.notes: Must show GATEFORGE_EVIDENCE_CONTEXT=HOSTED_STAGING npm run gateforge:ga-unblock with real staging secrets.

items.title: Provider webhook replay and idempotency proof
items.notes: Signed provider event accepted once, duplicate is idempotent, stale/replay rejected.

items.title: Monitoring and alerting proof
items.notes: Sentry/equivalent alert, uptime check, cron failure alert, webhook failure alert.

items.title: Hosted restore drill
items.notes: Backup, restore into disposable hosted restore DB, deploy:verify-restore PASS.

items.title: Legal and commercial final approval
items.notes: Terms, Privacy, DPA, subprocessors, retention policy, security contact final approved.

items.title: Hosted admin MFA runtime proof
items.notes: Hosted admin setup/verify plus admin-sensitive route rejects non-MFA session.

items.title: Hosted AI budget runtime proof
items.notes: Allowed call, cap-blocked call, kill-switch blocked call, and ai_usage_events references.
